caption: The video captures various scenes related to Indian political activity. In the first scene, several men are gathered outdoors, with one man in a red shirt gesturing with his arms raised. The second scene shows a man wearing an orange head covering being greeted with yellow floral garlands by a crowd. The third scene features a man in a brown shawl being interviewed by a reporter holding a microphone. The final scene depicts a group of men in formal suits and jackets walking together. Each frame contains a red banner at the bottom with the white text "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है" and a timestamp of "10:01 PM" next to the "MAHAODH" logo. A red banner across the top of some frames asks "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". The "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the final scene.
